name: PDF Generator API
description: Generate PDF documents from HTML, Markdown, or URLs with custom page sizes, margins, headers, and footers. Lightweight, fast, serverless.
long_description:
## Overview

PDF Generator API lets you create PDF documents programmatically from HTML, Markdown, or any public URL. Built on Cloudflare Workers for ultra-low latency worldwide.

## Key Features

- **HTML to PDF** — Convert raw HTML strings into clean PDF documents
- **Markdown to PDF** — Pass Markdown content and get a formatted PDF back
- **URL to PDF** — Provide any public URL and receive its content as a PDF
- **Custom Page Settings** — A4, A3, Letter, Legal page sizes with portrait/landscape orientation
- **Configurable Margins** — Set top, bottom, left, and right margins in points
- **Headers & Footers** — Add custom header/footer text with page number placeholders ({{page}}, {{pages}})
- **Font Control** — Adjustable font size and line height
- **Custom Filename** — Set the output filename in the Content-Disposition header

## Use Cases

- Invoice and receipt generation
- Report export from web dashboards
- Documentation archiving
- Email content to PDF conversion
- Blog post / article PDF export
- Batch document generation pipelines

## Technical Details

- Returns binary PDF with `application/pdf` content type
- No external dependencies or headless browsers — pure serverless
- Sub-100ms response times for typical documents
- Proper error handling with descriptive JSON error messages

endpoints.name: Health Check
endpoints.description: Returns API status and available endpoints

endpoints.name: Generate from HTML
endpoints.description: Convert HTML string to PDF. Supports custom page size, margins, headers, footers.

endpoints.name: Generate from URL
endpoints.description: Fetch a URL and convert its HTML content to PDF.

body_params.name: url
body_params.description: Public URL to fetch and convert
